files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/suite-page-implementation.generated.json",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.suite-shell",
  "lane": "business-ops",
  "implementationStatus": "renderable-primitive-factory-page",
  "source": "registry/suites/business-ops/suite-shell.json",
  "primitiveFactory": {
    "version": "2026-06-09.framework-neutral-component-factory",
    "source": "packages/ui/src/primitive-components.mjs",
    "implementationStatus": "framework-neutral-component-factory",
    "runtimeReactRenderer": false,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "harnessRuntimeExecution": false,
    "executableActions": false,
    "radixWrapper": false
  },
  "page": {
    "id": "page.business-ops.dashboard",
    "title": "Operations dashboard",
    "description": "Staffing, schedule exceptions, compliance signals, and display-only review actions.",
    "components": [
      "data-list",
      "agent-panel",
      "button",
      "panel"
    ]
  },
  "routes": [
    {
      "path": "/business-ops/dashboard",
      "page": "page.business-ops.dashboard",
      "title": "Operations dashboard",
      "blocks": [
        "block.business-ops.kpis",
        "block.business-ops.exceptions",
        "block.business-ops.agent-review"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "blocks": [
    {
      "id": "block.business-ops.kpis",
      "title": "Operational KPIs",
      "component": "data-list",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/blocks/business-ops-kpis-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "long-content"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "block.business-ops.exceptions",
      "title": "Schedule exceptions",
      "component": "data-list",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/blocks/business-ops-exceptions-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "empty",
        "error"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "block.business-ops.agent-review",
      "title": "Review queue",
      "component": "agent-panel",
      "implementationFile": "studio-ui/suites/business-ops/blocks/business-ops-agent-review-block.block.implementation.json",
      "renderedStates": [
        "ready",
        "error"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "components": [
    "agent-panel",
    "button",
    "data-list",
    "panel"
  ],
  "evidence": {
    "renderedBlockCount": 3,
    "responsiveLayout": "single-column-safe generated composition",
    "a11yStructure": "page routes compose labelled resident block implementations",
    "displayOnly": true
  },
  "runtime": {
    "runtimeReactRenderer": false,
    "hostedRuntime": false,
    "harnessRuntimeExecution": false,
    "executableActions": false,
    "radixWrapper": false
  },
  "provenance": {
    "source": "registry/suites/business-ops/suite-shell.json",
    "copiedSource": false
  }
}

items.name: command-grid-brand
items.title: Command Grid Brand Option
items.description: Selectable branding and template direction descriptor for sharper mixed-media and operations suite shells. It is not final brand canon.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/brand-option.source.json",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.brand-option",
  "optionId": "command-grid",
  "title": "Command Grid",
  "summary": "Sharper suite-shell direction for mixed-media and business operations: blue command accents, tighter radius, and registry-first install cards.",
  "status": "selectable-option",
  "canonicalBrand": false,
  "defaultKitRole": "suite shell stress-test candidate",
  "seedMaterial": {
    "source": "registry-root exploratory branding intake",
    "paths": [
      "docs/branding/logo-red-bg.jpg",
      "docs/branding/logo-gold-bg.png"
    ],
    "usage": "Exploratory cue reference only; no logo source or final mark is redistributed by this descriptor."
  },
  "tokenDeltas": {
    "semantic.light.accent": "#315C8E",
    "semantic.dark.accent": "#9BB7E3",
    "componentState.focusRing": "#A64B72",
    "radius.control": "4px",
    "spacing.control": "7px",
    "shell.dockWidth": "280px"
  },
  "workbenchControls": {
    "accent": "#315C8E",
    "focusRing": "#A64B72",
    "radius": "4",
    "spacing": "7",
    "density": "0.9",
    "motion": "80",
    "dockWidth": "280",
    "fontSize": "15"
  },
  "presentation": {
    "layout": "command-board shell with registry graph and media/status panes",
    "chrome": "tight cards, tabular metadata, strong install/provenance affordances",
    "markTreatment": "abstract glasses or bow-grid emblem for small package and app icons",
    "bestFor": [
      "mixed-media suite",
      "business operations suite",
      "registry item choice and install inspection"
    ],
    "risks": [
      "can feel too cold unless paired with the soft character cue",
      "requires careful contrast checks for blue accent on dark surfaces"
    ]
  },
  "accessibilityEvidence": {
    "contrastTargets": [
      "foreground/background remains inherited from the factory semantic pairs",
      "blue accent is intended for command states and selected registry rows"
    ],
    "states": [
      "registry choices",
      "media grids",
      "error and denied states",
      "narrow workbench viewport"
    ]
  },
  "provenance": {
    "source": "authored",
    "license": "MIT",
    "copiedSource": false
  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Authored selectable brand/template descriptor. It expresses token deltas against the accepted token model and does not redistribute logo source or claim final brand canon.

items.name: editorial-studio-brand
items.title: Editorial Studio Brand Option
items.description: Selectable branding and template direction descriptor for a calmer docs and research-writing suite presentation. It is not final brand canon.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/brand-option.source.json",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.brand-option",
  "optionId": "editorial-studio",
  "title": "Editorial Studio",
  "summary": "A restrained creator-workbench option with richer plum accent, quieter spacing, and wordmark-first presentation for docs and writing suites.",
  "status": "selectable-option",
  "canonicalBrand": false,
  "defaultKitRole": "editorial suite candidate",
  "seedMaterial": {
    "source": "registry-root exploratory branding intake",
    "paths": [
      "docs/branding/logo-cream-bg.jpg",
      "docs/branding/logo-peach-bg.jpg"
    ],
    "usage": "Exploratory cue reference only; no logo source or final mark is redistributed by this descriptor."
  },
  "tokenDeltas": {
    "semantic.light.accent": "#6F3D5F",
    "semantic.dark.accent": "#D8A5C8",
    "componentState.focusRing": "#237C7A",
    "radius.control": "8px",
    "spacing.control": "10px",
    "shell.dockWidth": "340px"
  },
  "workbenchControls": {
    "accent": "#6F3D5F",
    "focusRing": "#237C7A",
    "radius": "8",
    "spacing": "10",
    "density": "1.05",
    "motion": "140",
    "dockWidth": "340",
    "fontSize": "16"
  },
  "presentation": {
    "layout": "quiet document and source review shell",
    "chrome": "measured panels, larger reading rows, strong citation/status scanning",
    "markTreatment": "wordmark or serif title lockup with a simplified bow/glasses companion mark",
    "bestFor": [
      "research-writing suite",
      "docs and source panels",
      "brand book and documentation previews"
    ],
    "risks": [
      "must avoid drifting into a cream-only editorial page",
      "needs sharper app-chrome treatment for dense operations screens"
    ]
  },
  "accessibilityEvidence": {
    "contrastTargets": [
      "foreground/background remains inherited from the factory semantic pairs",
      "plum accent is intended for labelled controls, active tabs, and large UI emphasis"
    ],
    "states": [
      "source citations",
      "redacted panels",
      "long reading content",
      "light and dark modes"
    ]
  },
  "provenance": {
    "source": "authored",
    "license": "MIT",
    "copiedSource": false
  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Authored selectable brand/template descriptor. It expresses token deltas against the accepted token model and does not redistribute logo source or claim final brand canon.

items.name: jami-theme
items.title: Jami Factory Theme
items.description: Warm Jami factory theme: generated CSS variables, Tailwind @theme variables, TypeScript token names, and shadcn cssVars derived from the DTCG token source.

files.content:
// Generated by scripts/contracts/generate-contract-artifacts.mjs. Do not edit by hand.
export const tokenSchemaVersion = "2026-06-09.token-foundation" as const;

export const tokenNames = [
  "color.brand.accent",
  "color.brand.teal",
  "color.neutral.warm0",
  "color.neutral.warm950",
  "semantic.light.background",
  "semantic.light.foreground",
  "semantic.light.accent",
  "semantic.dark.background",
  "semantic.dark.foreground",
  "semantic.dark.accent",
  "typography.body",
  "spacing.control",
  "radius.control",
  "shadow.overlay",
  "motion.fast",
  "density.comfortable",
  "shell.dockWidth",
  "componentState.focusRing",
  "componentState.deprecatedAccentAlias",
] as const;

export type JamiTokenName = (typeof tokenNames)[number];

export const tokenCssVariables: Record<JamiTokenName, string> = {
  "color.brand.accent": "var(--jami-color-brand-accent)",
  "color.brand.teal": "var(--jami-color-brand-teal)",
  "color.neutral.warm0": "var(--jami-color-neutral-warm0)",
  "color.neutral.warm950": "var(--jami-color-neutral-warm950)",
  "semantic.light.background": "var(--jami-semantic-light-background)",
  "semantic.light.foreground": "var(--jami-semantic-light-foreground)",
  "semantic.light.accent": "var(--jami-semantic-light-accent)",
  "semantic.dark.background": "var(--jami-semantic-dark-background)",
  "semantic.dark.foreground": "var(--jami-semantic-dark-foreground)",
  "semantic.dark.accent": "var(--jami-semantic-dark-accent)",
  "typography.body": "var(--jami-typography-body)",
  "spacing.control": "var(--jami-spacing-control)",
  "radius.control": "var(--jami-radius-control)",
  "shadow.overlay": "var(--jami-shadow-overlay)",
  "motion.fast": "var(--jami-motion-fast)",
  "density.comfortable": "var(--jami-density-comfortable)",
  "shell.dockWidth": "var(--jami-shell-dockWidth)",
  "componentState.focusRing": "var(--jami-componentState-focusRing)",
  "componentState.deprecatedAccentAlias": "var(--jami-componentState-deprecatedAccentAlias)",
};

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Initial theme item. Files are the generated token outputs; regenerate with pnpm contracts:generate when the token source changes.

items.name: solo-suite
items.title: Solo Suite
items.description: Solo / general-workflow suite foundation: install-graph descriptor for the calendar, forms, docs, agent, tasks, and simple CRM/content/admin lane.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/suite-manifest.generated.json",
  "name": "@jami-studio/solo-suite",
  "lane": "solo",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.registry-foundation",
  "items": [
    "jami-theme",
    "button",
    "panel",
    "text-field",
    "data-list",
    "agent-panel",
    "docs-source-panel",
    "solo-app",
    "solo-today-page",
    "solo-docs-page",
    "solo-agenda-block",
    "solo-task-queue-block",
    "solo-agent-status-block",
    "solo-docs-sources-block",
    "solo-forms-block"
  ],
  "installGraph": {
    "root": "solo-suite",
    "dependencies": [
      "jami-theme",
      "button",
      "panel",
      "text-field",
      "data-list",
      "agent-panel",
      "docs-source-panel",
      "solo-app",
      "solo-today-page",
      "solo-docs-page",
      "solo-agenda-block",
      "solo-task-queue-block",
      "solo-agent-status-block",
      "solo-docs-sources-block",
      "solo-forms-block"
    ]
  },
  "plannedSurfaces": [
    "calendar",
    "forms",
    "docs",
    "agent",
    "tasks",
    "crm",
    "content",
    "admin"
  ],
  "shell": {
    "sourceSchemaVersion": "2026-06-09.suite-shell",
    "title": "Solo / General Workflow",
    "summary": "A compact personal operations shell for calendar, tasks, docs, forms, CRM, content, admin, and display-only agent status.",
    "appShell": {
      "id": "app.solo.shell",
      "layout": "workspace-with-rail",
      "navigation": [
        {
          "label": "Today",
          "route": "/solo/today"
        },
        {
          "label": "Tasks",
          "route": "/solo/tasks"
        },
        {
          "label": "Docs",
          "route": "/solo/docs"
        },
        {
          "label": "Admin",
          "route": "/solo/admin"
        }
      ]
    },
    "routes": [
      {
        "path": "/solo/today",
        "page": "page.solo.today",
        "title": "Today command center",
        "blocks": [
          "block.solo.agenda",
          "block.solo.task-queue",
          "block.solo.agent-status"
        ]
      },
      {
        "path": "/solo/docs",
        "page": "page.solo.docs",
        "title": "Docs and sources",
        "blocks": [
          "block.solo.docs-sources",
          "block.solo.forms"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "pages": [
      {
        "id": "page.solo.today",
        "title": "Today command center",
        "description": "Calendar, task queue, and non-executable agent status for a solo operator.",
        "components": [
          "data-list",
          "agent-panel",
          "button",
          "panel"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "page.solo.docs",
        "title": "Docs and sources",
        "description": "Documents, citations, lightweight forms, and long reference notes.",
        "components": [
          "docs-source-panel",
          "text-field",
          "data-list",
          "panel"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "blocks": [
      {
        "id": "block.solo.agenda",
        "title": "Agenda",
        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "long-content"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.solo.task-queue",
        "title": "Task queue",
        "component": "data-list",
        "stateExamples": [
          "empty"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.solo.agent-status",
        "title": "Agent status",
        "component": "agent-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "error"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.solo.docs-sources",
        "title": "Docs sources",
        "component": "docs-source-panel",
        "stateExamples": [
          "long-content"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "block.solo.forms",
        "title": "Quick form",
        "component": "text-field",
        "stateExamples": [
          "invalid"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "componentParts": [
      "agent-panel",
      "button",
      "data-list",
      "docs-source-panel",
      "panel",
      "text-field"
    ],
    "stateFixtures": {
      "longContent": "A long source title, task description, or calendar note wraps inside the shell without horizontal overflow.",
      "empty": "No tasks are due; the data-list announces an empty status instead of hiding the section.",
      "error": "Agent status is displayed as an error panel with no executable action wiring."
    },
    "provenance": {
      "source": "registry/suites/solo/suite-shell.json",
      "copiedSource": false
    }
  },
  "implementation": {
    "status": "renderable-primitive-factory-implementation",
    "runtimeReactApp": false,
    "app": "studio-ui/suites/solo/solo-app.implementation.json",
    "pages": [
      "studio-ui/suites/solo/pages/solo-today-page.page.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/solo/pages/solo-docs-page.page.implementation.json"
    ],
    "blocks": [
      "studio-ui/suites/solo/blocks/solo-agenda-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/solo/blocks/solo-task-queue-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/solo/blocks/solo-agent-status-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/solo/blocks/solo-docs-sources-block.block.implementation.json",
      "studio-ui/suites/solo/blocks/solo-forms-block.block.implementation.json"
    ]
  }
}

items.name: studio-console-brand
items.title: Studio Console Brand Option
items.description: Selectable branding and template direction descriptor for a dense operational default kit presentation. It is not final brand canon.

files.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://jami.studio/schemas/registry/brand-option.source.json",
  "schemaVersion": "2026-06-09.brand-option",
  "optionId": "studio-console",
  "title": "Studio Console",
  "summary": "Dense workbench shell with character cues reduced to compact chrome, teal command affordances, and controlled warm-magenta emphasis.",
  "status": "selectable-option",
  "canonicalBrand": false,
  "defaultKitRole": "operational default candidate",
  "seedMaterial": {
    "source": "registry-root exploratory branding intake",
    "paths": [
      "docs/branding/logo-white-bg.jpg",
      "docs/branding/logo-pink-bg.jpg"
    ],
    "usage": "Exploratory cue reference only; no logo source or final mark is redistributed by this descriptor."
  },
  "tokenDeltas": {
    "semantic.light.accent": "#2F6F73",
    "semantic.dark.accent": "#76C6BE",
    "componentState.focusRing": "#C14D84",
    "radius.control": "6px",
    "spacing.control": "8px",
    "shell.dockWidth": "300px"
  },
  "workbenchControls": {
    "accent": "#2F6F73",
    "focusRing": "#C14D84",
    "radius": "6",
    "spacing": "8",
    "density": "0.95",
    "motion": "100",
    "dockWidth": "300",
    "fontSize": "15"
  },
  "presentation": {
    "layout": "compact split registry and suite shell",
    "chrome": "flat panels, small badges, strong table/list density",
    "markTreatment": "tiny glasses/bow cue or monogram slot, not the detailed character image",
    "bestFor": [
      "default kit install preview",
      "CLI and registry package cards",
      "operator-heavy workbench sessions"
    ],
    "risks": [
      "can become too utilitarian if the character cue is removed entirely",
      "needs a production small mark before package badges use it"
    ]
  },
  "accessibilityEvidence": {
    "contrastTargets": [
      "foreground/background remains inherited from the factory semantic pairs",
      "accent is selected for AA non-text and large-control use against the warm light background"
    ],
    "states": [
      "focus-visible",
      "long content",
      "dense navigation",
      "dark mode"
    ]
  },
  "provenance": {
    "source": "authored",
    "license": "MIT",
    "copiedSource": false
  }
}

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Authored selectable brand/template descriptor. It expresses token deltas against the accepted token model and does not redistribute logo source or claim final brand canon.
